mapper.sql: id, article_id, commenter_id, commenter_name, commenter_type, content, parent_id, root_id, reply_to_id, reply_to_name, status, review_reason, like_count, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (id, article_id, commenter_id, commenter_name, commenter_type, content, parent_id, root_id, reply_to_id, reply_to_name, status, review_reason, like_count, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{articleId}, #{commenterId}, #{commenterName}, #{commenterType}, #{content}, #{parentId}, #{rootId}, #{replyToId}, #{replyToName}, #{status}, #{reviewReason}, #{likeCount}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM comments WHERE article_id = #{articleId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM comments WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM comments WHERE root_id = #{rootId} AND parent_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT FROM comments WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM comments WHERE commenter_id = #{commenterId} AND commenter_type = #{commenterType} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM comments WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND status = #{status} AND parent_id IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND status = #{status} AND parent_id IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE root_id = #{rootId} AND parent_id IS NOT NULL
